page_content: TLPL888 Apprenticeship in Education (1-8 Credits) Apprentice practice under professional supervision in an area of competence compatible with the student's professional goals. Credit not to be granted for experience accrued prior to registration. Open only to degree- and certiﬁcate-seeking graduate students. Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department. Credit Only Granted for: EDPS888 or TLPL888. Formerly: EDPS888.
